case_title: MANOR INVESTMENT INC DBA C & C CHECK CASHING CO. VS PRIESTLY LEONARD INDDBA ESP SERVICES

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRIESTLY LEONARD INDDBA ESP SERVICES

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $634.27 FILED BY MANOR INVESTMENT INC DBA C & C CHECK CASHING CO. AS TO DEFENDANT PRIESTLY LEONARD INDDBA ESP SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

TRIAL RESET TO OCT-14-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF OCT-02-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
